ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "base_charges" REAL /* Base charges associated with the customer account */,
  "doc_date" TEXT /* Date of the document (e.g., contract date) */,
  "total_charges" REAL /* Total charges accumulated by the customer */,
  "doe_date" TEXT /* Date of expiration for the contract */,
  "electronic_billing" TEXT /* Indicates if electronic billing is enabled */,
  "contract_type" INTEGER /* Reference to the contract type */,
  "payment_method" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's physical address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined */,
  "last_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last payment made */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Any applicable discount code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_payment_method FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_contract_type FOREIGN KEY ("contract_type") REFERENCES contract_types ("contract_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing_history" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing record */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer associated with this billing record */,
  "billing_date" TEXT /* Date of the billing statement */,
  "amount_due" REAL /* Amount due for the billing period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the billing (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  "service_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the service period */,
  "service_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the service period */,
  "late_fee" REAL /* Any late fee applied */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_types" (
  "contract_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract type */,
  "contract_name" TEXT /* Name of the contract type (e.g., Month-to-month) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contract type */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the contract */,
  "renewal_policy" TEXT /* Policy for contract renewal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., Electronic check) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "processing_fee" REAL /* Any processing fee associated with the method */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user managing accounts */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer service, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the customer account */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access to the account */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access to the account */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., billing, promotional) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
